productPromise: Pick the bracket before FIFA locks it.
Watch the groups reshape the board.
See whether your read of the tournament was right.

stateDescriptions.GROUP_STAGE_OPEN: Players may make pre-lock R32 projection picks.
stateDescriptions.R32_PROJECTION_LIVE: Curated standings projection may reshape projected R32 placement.
stateDescriptions.FIFA_R32_LOCKED: Official FIFA R32 has been captured and frozen.
stateDescriptions.KNOCKOUT_PICKING_OPEN: Players continue by picking knockout winners.
stateDescriptions.KNOCKOUT_LIVE: Official knockout results are scoring the bracket.

truthLayers.playerProjection: The player's pre-lock R32 placement prediction.
truthLayers.officialLockedR32: The official R32 once FIFA locks the bracket.
truthLayers.knockoutWinnerPicks: The player's post-lock knockout winner picks.
